AI Builder Portfolio

Ben
Jones

This is my AI portfolio, a place to showcase the tools and projects I've created using AI. I built this entire website using Claude, and the same goes for everything you'll find here.

There's an interview simulator and a company finder for anyone navigating a job search, and a college data map I put together as a recent grad curious about how different schools actually compare. Poke around, try something out, and let me know what you think.

Scroll down and check it out ↓

About

A bit
about me

Hey! I'm Ben. Outside of tech, I love playing the piano, it's one of my favorite ways to stay creative, disconnect from the noise, and just have fun. I'm someone who genuinely enjoys life away from the screen: good people, good experiences, and and knowing when to step away from the screen.

Here are a couple videos that give you a little glimpse of who I am when I'm not building things.

Now

Learning to
build with AI

Over the past year I've gone from curious experimenter to someone who builds real tools with AI. I'm fascinated by the gap between "AI can do that" and "AI does that reliably, every time", and I spend a lot of time trying to close it.

I build skills, workflows, and tools that put AI to work on the stuff that's tedious, messy, or slow.

Right now I'm deep in a run of projects exploring what's genuinely possible when you combine good design thinking with AI capabilities. This portfolio is a live record of that exploration.

Tool

Practice your
interview answers

Enter a company name and paste a job description. The simulator will generate tailored questions, transcribe your spoken answers in real time, and give you AI coaching on how to sharpen each response.
